details.feature: Swap person on shift in build mode

DB column exists since migration 005; no UI reads/writes it

items.title: Content Planning Foundation
items.description: Court Reserve events sync into CourtOps, and Settings → Content configures channels, pillars, and audiences for the campaign system.

items.title: Full Clock History
items.description: Admins can load any date range of clock entries on demand; recent view widened to 30 days. Stale swap posts no longer clutter the swap board.

items.title: Availability Due-Date Alerts
items.description: Urgency-colored due badges with days remaining on window pills, plus a calendar banner that stays until you submit.

items.title: 15-Minute Scheduling
items.description: Schedule grid supports 15-minute increments for finer shift control.

items.title: My-Shift Highlighting
items.description: Your own shifts are visually highlighted on the full team schedule.

items.title: Staff Scheduling
items.description: Build schedules with drag-to-assign, coverage-aware magic schedule, and draft/release workflow.

items.title: Availability Management
items.description: Monthly availability windows with staff submissions, admin review, and deadline reminders.

items.title: Shift Swap & Take
items.description: Staff can post shifts for swap or take. Coworkers claim, admin approves.

items.title: Schedule PDF Export
items.description: Export week or month schedules as PDF. Supports 'My schedule' and full team views.

items.title: Daily Checklists
items.description: Configurable opening/midday/closing checklists with completion tracking and notes.

items.title: Pipeline & Lead Management
items.description: 4-pipeline kanban with activity timeline, cadence tracking, and source reporting.

items.title: SOPs with AI Suggest
items.description: Standard operating procedures library with markdown editor, iframe embeds, and AI-powered category/tag suggestions.

items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Stats overview, who's on shift, my tasks, cadence tracking, and activity feed.

items.title: Task Management
items.description: Full task system with assignee, priority, due dates, and filter tabs.

items.title: Notification System
items.description: In-app notifications with unread badge, availability reminders, and admin alerts.

items.title: Time Clock & Attendance
items.description: Clock in/out, missed entry logging, admin edit with audit trail, hours summary.

items.title: Time Off Requests
items.description: Staff request time off, admin approves or denies.

items.title: Staff Roster
items.description: Sortable/filterable staff table with edit modal, capabilities, and hide-inactive toggle.

items.title: Team Invites
items.description: Email-based invite flow via Resend with role assignment and acceptance.

items.title: Reports
items.description: Pipeline conversion rates and lead source effectiveness.

items.title: Settings & Integrations
items.description: Org settings, business hours, Court Reserve credentials, scheduling config, and membership types.
